name: terminal-notify
description: Notifies you when a terminal command finishes — only when you're not watching.

terminalNotify.durationThresholdSeconds.description: Minimum command duration (in seconds) to trigger a notification when the terminal is focused.

terminalNotify.alwaysNotifyWhenUnfocused.description: Always notify when VS Code window is not focused, regardless of command duration.

terminalNotify.alwaysNotifyWhenTerminalH.description: Always notify when the completed terminal is not the active one.

terminalNotify.showDesktopNotification.description: Show native desktop notification in addition to VS Code popup.

terminalNotify.popupAutoDismissSeconds.description: Auto-dismiss the VS Code popup after this many seconds. 0 disables auto-dismiss (popup stays until clicked).

terminalNotify.playSound.description: Play a sound when the notification fires.

terminalNotify.notifyOn.description: When to notify: on success, error, or both.

terminalNotify.includeDuration.description: Include command duration in the notification message.

terminalNotify.includeCommandPreview.description: Include a preview of the command in the notification.

terminalNotify.excludeCommands.description: List of command prefixes to exclude from notifications (e.g. ["cd", "ls", "echo"]).
